title: Metal Gear Rising Revengance Music Discs
description:
Standing here I realize no one has made this, so I did it myself.

Replaces all music discs with every MGRR vocal track, main menu theme, and 2 bonus songs.

Replaces music disc names with MGRR track names.
body:
WARNING: As of 1.19.4 there is an issue with Minecraft where the discs are hard coded to stop playing at their original time, meaning any song that goes over that time gets abruptly cut off. I hope this gets fixed soon. https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-260346

Standing here I realize no one has made this, so I did it myself.

Replaces all music discs with every MGRR vocal track, main menu theme, and 2 bonus songs.

Replaces music disc names with MGRR track names.

Songs

13=Rules of Nature
cat=The Only Thing I Know For Real
blocks=Dark Skies
chirp=I'm My Own Master Now
far=A Stranger I Remain
mall=Return to Ashes
mellohi=The Stains of Time
stal=Red Sun
strad=A Soul Can't Be Cut
ward=Collective Consciousness
11=It Has to Be This Way
wait=The War Still Rages Within
otherside=The Hot Wind Blowing
Pigstep=Revenge With a Vengeance
5= I want to keep this one as a surprise :)
relic= Surprise song 2 electric boogaloo :D

Credit to Jamie Christopherson and Something Else Music Works for the Soundtrack.

I have a Bedrock version on my google drive because I can't find a site to host it. https://drive.google.com/file/d/14IlbKSU1GXLEuxgVaGayuN87u89rHWS5/view?usp=sharing

Comments Page: https://github.com/theoracle1173/Metal-Gear-Rising-Revengeance-Music-Discs/discussions/categories/general

This project used to be on curseforge so I am writing the number of downloads from there here for personal record. Java: 1,509 Downloads    Bedrock: 915 Downloads
